name: Google Analytics 4 (GA4)
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can configure Google Analytics 4 to track site search activity and create custom audiences based on search behavior, enabling more sophisticated analysis of how customers discover products through your Merchandising Cloud implementation. This tracking helps you measure search-to-purchase conversion and identify high-value search segments that can inform your merchandising and marketing strategies."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Setting up GA4 site search tracking and custom audiences provides deeper insights into customer search patterns and purchasing behavior. By creating audiences that track users who search and subsequently purchase, you can measure the effectiveness of your search functionality, optimize product visibility, and understand which search experiences lead to better conversion outcomes."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "How to enable Site Search tracking on GA 4"}], "data-id": "how-to-enable-site-search-tracking-on-ga-4"}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 1: Log into your Google Account"}], "data-id": "step-1-log-into-your-google-account"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Log into your"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://analytics.google.com", "children": [{"text": " Google Account"}], "target": "_blank"}, {"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 2: Go to "Data Streams""}], "data-id": "step-2-go-to-data-streams"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In the admin panel, navigate to "Data Streams" Settings, or use the search bar on top"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/F34DAYDCR9V5/52d4d92-1-data-streams.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/F34DAYDCR9V5/52d4d92-1-data-streams.png", "name": "52d4d92-1._Data_Streams.png", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 688, "width": 1553, "displaySize": "large"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click on the website you want to enable or verify site search settings"}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 3: Configure "Enhanced Measurement""}], "data-id": "step-3-configure-enhanced-measurement"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/NDB482L0LV1G/ff9abfa-2-enhanced-measurement.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/NDB482L0LV1G/ff9abfa-2-enhanced-measurement.png", "name": "ff9abfa-2._Enhanced_measurement.png", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 493, "width": 1285, "displaySize": "large"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "First, confirm that the 'Enhanced measurement' option has been activated as Shown above."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Then, click on the small gear icon located on the right-hand side to unveil the expanded list of enhanced settings. It is important to verify that the 'Site search' setting is activated."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/EMMUIDP0NEBP/0910a20-3-site-search.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/EMMUIDP0NEBP/0910a20-3-site-search.png", "name": "0910a20-3._Site_Search.png", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 1125, "width": 1251, "displaySize": "large"}}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "
Step 4: Configure query parameter"}], "data-id": "step-4-configure-query-parameter"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In the menu, go to "Site Search" settings & click on the "Show advanced settings" to configure the query parameters. Query parameter can be adjusted in Maropost Merchandising Cloud (formerly Findify) and the most commonly used are "}, {"text": "findify_q", "bold": true}, {"text": " or "}, {"text": "search_q ", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You'll easiest find the parameter used in your store by conducting a search & reviewing the URL."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "e.g. "}, {"text": "q", "bold": true}, {"text": " in ["}, {"forceBasicLink": true, "type": "a", "url": "https://demo.findify.io/pages/search-results", "embedData": {"body": "Findify Demo Shop", "url": "https://demo.findify.io/pages/search-results", "embedType": "link", "name": "Search Results"}, "children": [{"text": "https://demo.findify.io/pages/search-results"}]}, {"text": "?"}, {"text": "q", "bold": true}, {"text": "=item]"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/SPR26Q6BGRH3/e3efbbe-4-queryparameter-url.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/SPR26Q6BGRH3/e3efbbe-4-queryparameter-url.png", "name": "e3efbbe-4._QueryParameter_URL.png", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 118, "width": 513, "displaySize": "large"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Ensure that the parameter you're using is listed in the advanced settings."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "📘Default Tracking", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "By default, search events are automatically tracked by Google Analytics if you have Site Search Tracking enabled in your Google Analytics setup."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "However, in certain cases, Merchandising Cloud query parameters can conflict with your site query parameters which can cause issues. "}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To overcome this issue, we're prefixing our parameters with a common prefix, e.g. "}, {"text": "findify", "code": true}, {"text": ", so instead of "}, {"text": "q", "code": true}, {"text": " to identify the query parameter, "}, {"text": "findify_q", "code": true}, {"text": " is used, which is not tracked by Google Analytics by default."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/TVO9MLE0YWE3/9410805-5-configure-parameter.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/TVO9MLE0YWE3/9410805-5-configure-parameter.png", "name": "9410805-5._Configure_Parameter.png", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 941, "width": 842, "displaySize": "large"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 5: Save your changes"}], "data-id": "step-5-save-your-changes"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Make sure you save your changes before exiting the Enhanced measurement tab."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Note:", "bold": true}, {"text": " Query parameters cannot have additional characters like "_", "-" etc."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you have special requirements, reach out to our support team for help with setting this up in the best way."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "How to create a custom audience in GA4"}], "data-id": "how-to-create-a-custom-audience-in-ga4"}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "What is a GA4 Audience?"}], "data-id": "what-is-a-ga4-audience"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Simplified, an audience is a group of users that you want to monitor based on any combination of interactions in a given timeframe. The audience allows you to segment the users based on events, dimensions and metrics important to a business."}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Examples"}], "data-id": "examples"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Mobile audience:", "bold": true}, {"text": " users who visited the website on a mobile device"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Purchasers: ", "bold": true}, {"text": "users who make a purchase."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "GA4 evaluates if a user belongs to an audience group based on the criteria that is set up, if a user qualifies they are added. If they no longer meet a criteria they are also automatically removed. A user that satisfies the conditions of multiple audience groups will be included in all of them ("}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://support.google.com/analytics/answer/12799087?hl=en", "children": [{"text": "Read more here"}], "target": "_blank"}, {"text": ")"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "By default, Google automatically creates two audiences for you ‘All users’ and ‘Purchasers’."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In order to collect and track site specific Merchandising Cloud search activity you need to create a custom audience that captures and satisfies certain criteria."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Before we begin ensure you have enabled site search on your Google account (as described in section above)."}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 1: Log into your Google Account"}], "data-id": "step-1-log-into-your-google-account-1"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Log into your"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://analytics.google.com/", "children": [{"text": " Google Account"}], "target": "_blank"}, {"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 2: Go to "Audience" Settings"}], "data-id": "step-2-go-to-audience-settings"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In the admin panel, navigate to "Audience" settings, or use the search bar on top."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Select New Audience."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/HZHI368C1FHJ/69ea535-1-audience-settings.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/HZHI368C1FHJ/69ea535-1-audience-settings.png", "name": "69ea535-1._Audience_Settings.png", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 854, "width": 1600, "displaySize": "large"}}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "
"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "Step 3: Configure the New Audience"}], "data-id": "step-3-configure-the-new-audience"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Select New Custom Audience"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/CHCTXBVXCRJM/5e9b6d8-2-new-custom.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/CHCTXBVXCRJM/5e9b6d8-2-new-custom.png", "name": "5e9b6d8-2._New_Custom.png", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 830, "width": 1600, "displaySize": "large"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When setting up an audience you need to define the scope, event, dimension, or metric that you would like to apply"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Scope : This defines the scope of when conditions will be met"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Across all sessions - adds a user to the audience if the condition is true for all the previous sessions"}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Within the same session - adds a user to the audience if the condition is true for the current session (live session)"}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Single event - adds the user to the audience if the condition is true for a particular event"}]}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/LANAOFVQI0MA/226e464-3-set-scope.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/LANAOFVQI0MA/226e464-3-set-scope.png", "name": "226e464-3._Set_Scope.png", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 486, "width": 1600, "displaySize": "large"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "
"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "Select "Within the same session""}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/9S6GEV8VY8C5/15a7b40-4-same-session.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/9S6GEV8VY8C5/15a7b40-4-same-session.png", "name": "15a7b40-4._Same_Session.png", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 575, "width": 1600, "displaySize": "large"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "
"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "Set duration to 1 day to capture activity per day."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/YR1NRMXB2G36/9ba90fd-5-membership-duration.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/YR1NRMXB2G36/9ba90fd-5-membership-duration.png", "name": "9ba90fd-5._Membership_Duration.png", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 462, "width": 1600, "displaySize": "large"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "
"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "By default, GA4 fires the "view_search_results" event when a user inputs a query and clicks on the search button on the website. As the event gets fired on the website, Google sends default parameters such as search_term, page_location and source."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Select the event "view_search_results"."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": If there is no "view_search_results" - event, the site search tracking is not correctly defined or there is no analytics captured."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/OIGTI6177JIW/02f8181-6-critera.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/OIGTI6177JIW/02f8181-6-critera.png", "name": "02f8181-6._Critera.png", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 507, "width": 1236, "displaySize": "large"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Additional criteria can be added as sequences let you specify conditions that need to be met for a user to become a member of this audience."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In order to know the activity that triggered a purchase as a result of search on the website, a sequence of event "purchase" can be added."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/3S0STLJ7KXIJ/ec76703-9-purchase.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/3S0STLJ7KXIJ/ec76703-9-purchase.png", "name": "ec76703-9._Purchase.png", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 337, "width": 1191, "displaySize": "large"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "
It is important to keep the scope the same as before ‘Within the same session’"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/CLYSRUJ066MD/8ccd404-8-session.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/CLYSRUJ066MD/8ccd404-8-session.png", "name": "8ccd404-8._Session.png", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 568, "width": 1600, "displaySize": "large"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "📘"}, {"text": "DebugView", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If something is off in your data, Google has added a great functionality in DebugView. Read more how to use it in this "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.analyticsmania.com/post/debugview-in-google-analytics-4/?", "children": [{"text": "external blogpost"}], "target": "_blank"}, {"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
